reviews.comment:
ACA. Siempre el ACA. Los mejores productos y combustibles a lo largo y ancho de todo el país. Destacable los UNICOS BAÑOS LIMPIOS Y USABLES SEGUROS DE TODO EL INTERIOR.  Pedido, cuando las colas larguísimas de temporada alta "detonan" el expendio de combustibles, se podrá asignar un surtidor "SOLO SOCIOS"??????Gracias!!

(Translated by Google)
ACA. Always ACA. The best products and fuels throughout the entire country. A highlight is the ONLY CLEAN, USABLE, AND SAFE RESTROOMS IN THE ENTIRE INTERIOR. A request: when the extremely long lines during peak season overwhelm the fuel pumps, could a "MEMBERS ONLY" pump be designated? Thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtZzhyOXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No es YPf full y el servicio no es bueno. No aceptan debito.

(Translated by Google)
It's not a YPF Full service station and the service isn't good. They don't accept debit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbll5NC1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lleno de moscas, tardan mil años en traer la comida que de por si es carísima y además de todo eso me trajeron la comida por la mitad, osea que espere más de 40 minutos para que no me pudieran traer el puré, me dijeron si quería papas y acepte a lo que tampoco podían traerme las papas y me tuve que conformar con comer una milanesa frita al maximo re seca, no lo recomiendo si quieren seguir feliz su viaje.

(Translated by Google)
It was full of flies, they take forever to bring the food which is already incredibly expensive, and on top of that, they only brought me half the portion. I waited over 40 minutes and they couldn't even bring me the mashed potatoes. They asked if I wanted potatoes and I said yes, but they couldn't bring me the potatoes either, so I had to settle for a very dry, deep-fried breaded cutlet. I don't recommend it if you want to continue your trip happily.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMWJqUWxnRRAB
